improvements: Rewrote split_files.py: argparse CLI, type hints, logging, try/except around all I/O
Fixed remainder-lines bug: last chunk now absorbs modulo remainder so no lines are dropped
Added tests/test_split_files.py: 8-test pytest suite covering edge cases
Added .github/workflows/ci.yml: ruff lint + pytest on every push/PR
Added .gitignore and .env.example for safe credential management
Fixed UDF and tables.sql: missing semicolons, hardcoded AWS creds replaced with $VAR placeholders, review_count cast to INT
Updated README: CI badge, CLI usage docs, env-vars reference table, test section
Fixed split_file edge case: cap num_files to total_lines when it exceeds line count (no empty output files)
Added --output-dir CLI argument to split_files.py with auto-mkdir support
Added snowflake_connector.py: reads Snowflake credentials from env/.env, validates all required vars, lazy-imports connector
Expanded test suite from 8 to 19 tests (81% coverage): cap logic, --output-dir, main(), Snowflake connector mocked tests
Updated requirements.txt: added pytest-cov, python-dotenv, mypy
Updated CI: added mypy type-check step, switched pytest to --cov with 75% threshold
Updated README: new features, Docker usage, project structure, test results (19 tests, 81% coverage)
